problem_text_cn: 4-21 行星绕着恒星S作圆周运动，设S在很短时间内发生爆炸，通过强辐射流使其质量减少为原质量$\gamma$倍，行星随即进入椭圆轨道绕S运行，试求椭圆偏心率$e$。
problem_text_en: 4-21 A planet orbits star S in a circular path. Suddenly, star S explodes, reducing its mass to $\gamma$ times the original mass within a very short time via a strong radiation flux. Consequently, the planet enters an elliptical orbit around S. Determine the eccentricity $e$ of the ellipse.
problem_solution_cn:
解 若行星轨道转换点为图4-16中1处，则对原轨道、新轨道分别有

$$ \frac{mv^{2}}{a-c}=G\frac{M_{0}m}{(a-c)^{2}},\qquad \frac{mv_{1}^{2}}{\rho_{1}}=G\frac{Mm}{(a-c)^{2}}, $$

其中$m$为行星质量，$M_{0}$为恒星原质量，$M$为恒星新质量，$a-c$为原轨道半径，$\rho_{1}$为椭圆在1处的曲率半径。因$v_{1}=v, M<M_{0}$，得

$$ \frac{v_{1}^{2}}{a}=\rho_{1}>a-c,\quad\text{即}\quad ac>a^{2}-b^{2}=c^{2}. $$

这显然成立。

若行星轨道转换点为图4-16中2处，相应有

$$ \begin{align*} &\frac{mv^{2}}{a+c}=G\frac{M_{0}m}{(a+c)^{2}},\qquad \frac{mv_{2}^{2}}{\rho_{2}}=G\frac{Mm}{(a+c)^{2}},\\ &v_{2}=v,\quad\rho_{2}=\rho_{1}=b^{2}/a,\qquad M<M_{0}, \end{align*} $$

则得

$$ \frac{b^{2}}{a}>a+c,\quad\text{即}\quad b^{2}>a^{2}+ac. $$

对于椭圆这是不可能的。

综上所述，行星轨道转换点应在图中1处。可解得

$$ v^{2}=\frac{GM_{0}}{a-c},\qquad v_{1}^{2}=\frac{GM\rho_{1}}{(a-c)^{2}}, $$

将$v_{1}=v,\rho_{1}=b^{2}/a,M=\gamma M_{0}$代入，得

$$ a(a-c)=\gamma(a^{2}-c^{2}), $$

继而算得偏心率为

$$ e=\frac{c}{a}=\frac{1-\gamma}{\gamma}. $$
problem_solution_en:
Solution If the transition point of the planet’s orbit is at point 1 in Figure 4‑16, then for the original and the new orbits we have respectively

$$ \frac{mv^{2}}{a-c}=G\frac{M_{0}m}{(a-c)^{2}},\qquad \frac{mv_{1}^{2}}{\rho_{1}}=G\frac{Mm}{(a-c)^{2}}, $$

where $m$ is the mass of the planet, $M_{0}$ the original mass of the star, $M$ the new mass of the star, $a-c$ the original orbital radius, and $\rho_{1}$ the curvature radius of the ellipse at point 1. Since $v_{1}=v$ and $M<M_{0}$, we obtain

$$ \frac{v_{1}^{2}}{a}=\rho_{1}>a-c,\quad\text{i.e.}\quad ac>a^{2}-b^{2}=c^{2}. $$

This evidently holds.

If the transition point is at point 2 in Figure 4‑16, we have

$$ \begin{align*} &\frac{mv^{2}}{a+c}=G\frac{M_{0}m}{(a+c)^{2}},\qquad \frac{mv_{2}^{2}}{\rho_{2}}=G\frac{Mm}{(a+c)^{2}},\\ &v_{2}=v,\quad\rho_{2}=\rho_{1}=b^{2}/a,\qquad M<M_{0}, \end{align*} $$

which gives

$$ \frac{b^{2}}{a}>a+c,\quad\text{i.e.}\quad b^{2}>a^{2}+ac. $$

This is impossible for an ellipse.

Therefore, the transition point must be at point 1 in the figure. Solving

$$ v^{2}=\frac{GM_{0}}{a-c},\qquad v_{1}^{2}=\frac{GM\rho_{1}}{(a-c)^{2}}, $$

and substituting $v_{1}=v$, $\rho_{1}=b^{2}/a$, $M=\gamma M_{0}$, we obtain

$$ a(a-c)=\gamma(a^{2}-c^{2}), $$

and finally the eccentricity is

$$ e=\frac{c}{a}=\frac{1-\gamma}{\gamma}. $$
img_cn:
图4-16是一个椭圆轨道示意图，中心为恒星S。图中标注了椭圆的两个焦点（焦点S和另一焦点）以及行星在轨道上的两个位置点1和2。点1位于椭圆长轴靠近焦点S的一端，与焦点S的距离为$a-c$，$a$是半长轴，$c$是半焦距。点2位于椭圆长轴的另一端，与焦点S的距离为$a+c$。图中还标注了椭圆的几何参数$a$、$b$、$c$，以及行星在点1和点2处的速度$v$、曲率半径$\rho$等信息。该图用于分析行星轨道转换点（爆炸瞬间行星所处位置）对后续椭圆轨道的影响。

 图4-16清晰地展示了椭圆轨道的基本几何关系和物理量的定义，是解题过程中分析向心力和曲率半径等物理条件的关键图示。
img_en:
Figure 4-16 is a schematic diagram of an elliptical orbit, with the star S at one focus. The figure marks the two foci of the ellipse (focus S and the other focus) and two positions 1 and 2 of the planet on the orbit. Point 1 lies on the major axis near focus S, at a distance $a-c$ from S, where $a$ is the semi‑major axis and $c$ the semi‑focal distance. Point 2 is at the opposite end of the major axis, at a distance $a+c$ from S. The diagram also labels the geometric parameters $a$, $b$, $c$ of the ellipse, as well as the velocity $v$ and the curvature radius $\rho$ of the planet at points 1 and 2. The figure is used to analyze the effect of the transition point (the planet’s position at the instant of explosion) on the subsequent elliptical orbit.

 Figure 4-16 clearly illustrates the basic geometric relations of the elliptical orbit and the definitions of physical quantities; it is a key visual aid for analyzing the centripetal force and curvature radius conditions in the solution.
